member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.Brita
member.summary: Builds a default Brita handler object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandler.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaHandler.#ctor(Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.IPrimeTraceIdService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Constuctor for using trace id mock for unit tests.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaStorage.BritaChecksumInstanceNames
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaStorage.FlowItemsListNoFlowable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaStorage.FlowItemToFlowable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.BritaStorage.ConcurrentFlowables
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether die id post execute is enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBrita
member.summary: Interface to abstract the building of a Brita handler.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBrita.TryEnableFlowTrace
member.summary: Try to enable flow trace if brita is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBrita.TryDisableFlowTrace
member.summary: Try to disable flow trace if brita is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBritaHandler.GetChecksumAndVersion(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets checksum string encoded by Trace API.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Brita.IBritaHandler.GetTraceId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets trace id string representing executed instances and ports encoded for Trace.
member.returns: Brita trace id for currently executed unit/flow.
